title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Dr Lal PathLabs

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Dr Lal PathLabs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!
